data.description_suggestion: Creates a new third party (customer, supplier, or partner) in the ERP system. Accepts ThirdPartyInput with company details such as name, address, and contact information. data.description_suggestion: Deletes an invoice from the ERP system. Requires the invoice ID as a path parameter. Deletion is permanent and removes the invoice and its associated line items from the system.
